title: Regenerating your Acme Cloud API key
body: To regenerate your API key, go to Settings > Developer > API Keys in the Acme Cloud dashboard. Click 'Regenerate', confirm, and copy the new key immediately — it is shown only once. Update any integrations that used the old key, as it is revoked instantly.

title: Changing your notification email
body: Notification settings live under Settings > Notifications (not Account). Enter the new alert email address and click Save. A confirmation email is sent to the new address; the change takes effect once confirmed.

title: Resolving 401 errors on webhook integrations
body: A 401 on a webhook almost always means the signing secret, not the API token, is wrong. Webhooks authenticate with a dedicated signing secret found under Settings > Integrations > Webhooks. Copy the signing secret (it differs from your API key) into your integration's configuration.

title: Understanding duplicate charges
body: Duplicate charges can occur when a payment retry is misattributed. Our billing system flags identical order amounts within 24 hours. If you see two identical orders, a refund for the duplicate is processed automatically within 5 business days. For faster handling, contact billing with both order numbers.
